items.headline: Anthony Edwards is Jaden McDaniels’ No. 1 Fan - With UM Music (“Soul Survivor” by Young Jeezy)
items.description:
"He's my favorite player in the NBA."
Anthony Edwards is Jaden McDaniels’ No. 1 fan 
The Timberwolves' duo will seek a 2-1 series in the West Semis at 9:30pm/et on Prime!

items.headline: The Scout S4E29: New and Improved 76ers
items.description:
The Sixers looked down and out — then pulled off an incredible 3-1 comeback against the Celtics.
Now with Embiid looking like himself again, Maxey rising, and the supporting cast stepping up, Philadelphia is starting to click at the perfect time.
So how are they doing it?
We break it all down on The Scout.

items.headline: Game Recap: Thunder 125, Lakers 107
items.description: The Thunder win their 6th straight playoff game, as they defeated the Lakers, 125-107 to take a 2-0 series lead.

items.headline: SGA, Chet Holmgren, Ajay Mitchell lead Thunder in Game 2
items.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander (22 points), Chet Holmgren (22 points), and Ajay Mitchell (20 points) combine for 64 points in Game 2.
